benchmarkOutline.keyword: single person apartment essential appliances buying guide 2026

topic.angle: Cross-category starter essentials for one-person apartments: compact cooling, air quality, desk tech, and quick meals without full-size appliance sprawl

instructions: Write one bilingual draft (en+ko, draft:true) with contentProfile:checklist. Writing mode: benchmark. Tone: case-study. Follow docs/templates/checklist.md and docs/CONTENT_STANDARDS.md. Season priority: summer; active events: 여름·방학, 폭염·냉방. CROSS-CATEGORY ANGLE (household-type): Single-person apartment / 1인 가구. Cover multiple product categories in ONE article — anchor categories: electric-fans, air-purifiers, air-fryers, wireless-earbuds, robot-vacuums. Do NOT write a single-product deep dive; each section compares categories for this household/price/capacity theme. Suggested slug: 2026-solo-apartment-home-essentials-checklist-guide-20260723. Frontmatter: contentAngle: solo-apartment-essentials, topicId: meta-solo-apartment-essentials. Use the benchmark outline in this request (outline-first). Paraphrase all sections; never copy SERP text. Publish-ready before complete: description 50–160 chars (en+ko), "## FAQ" / "## 자주 묻는 질문" with ≥3 ### Q&A pairs (profile minimum), coverImage on disk, profile template sections. Cover: never copy another post cover. If no local PEXELS/PIXABAY keys, omit coverImage, push, let GHA "Fetch missing draft covers" run (repo Secrets), then git pull. Draft frontmatter: set createdAt to now; date = today KST (publish overwrites at go-live) — never future date on buffer drafts. Run `npm run content:integrity:repair` (or `node scripts/check-integrity.mjs {slug} --draft --repair`) — must pass with zero errors. Do NOT use `npm run content:validate` alone (published posts only). Then set status to complete.
